title: Registry Artifact Entry
description: Schema for a hc-grc registry artifact entry. Every artifact registered by context-manager must satisfy this schema. Fields enforced by stage_gate.py --validate-artifact are marked [gate-enforced]. Full provenance fields per CLAUDE.md hard constraint #8 are marked [provenance].

artifact_id.description: [gate-enforced] Unique identifier for this artifact. Convention: <stage_id>-<artifact_type>[-<framework>]-<short-slug>. Must be globally unique within the registry.

artifact_type.description: [gate-enforced] Artifact type drawn from the artifact_types enum in docs/STAGE_GATES.yaml. stage_gate.py rejects any value not in that list.

stage_id.description: [gate-enforced] Stage this artifact belongs to. Must be one of the stages defined in docs/STAGE_GATES.yaml.

certificate_ref.description: [gate-enforced] Stem of the certificate filename under ledger/certificates/. Full path: ledger/certificates/<certificate_ref>.json. stage_gate.py resolves this path and requires verdict == ACCEPT.

framework.description: [provenance] Framework this artifact belongs to (e.g. scf, nist-800-53). Null for program-level or synthesis stages (P0, P1, S3, X1-X5). Required and non-null for per-framework stages (S1f, S4-S9).

question_id.description: [provenance] For investigation artifacts (S7, X2): the registered question ID this artifact answers. Null for non-investigation artifacts; when null, null_reason is required.

null_reason.description: Required when question_id is null. Explains why this artifact has no associated question (e.g., 'infrastructure artifact', 'corpus construction', 'instrument validation').

producer.description: [provenance] The agent and model that produced this artifact.

model.description: Model identifier used for production (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6, claude-opus-4-5).

adversary.description: [provenance] The adversary that certified this artifact. For P0 stage (required_adversary_disciplines: []) this must be the self-attestation form. For all other stages this must be the full adversary review form with agent, model, and family.

oneOf.title: Adversary review (stages P1+)
oneOf.description: Used for all stages with at least one required adversary discipline. The adversary is a same-discipline Tier-2 agent running a different model from the producer.

agent.description: Adversary agent identity in format role/model@hostname (e.g. data-engineer-adversary/claude-opus-4-8@hc-macbook-pro.local).

model.description: Model used by the adversary. Should differ from the producer's model for Layer-3 weight independence.

family.description: Model family of the adversary (always 'anthropic' in this program). Explicit so the single-family limitation is surfaced in every record.

stance.description: Rotating review stance applied by the adversary.

oneOf.title: Self-attestation (P0 only)
oneOf.description: Used only for stage P0 (required_adversary_disciplines: []). The coordinator or Tier-0 agent attests the artifact meets the stage DoD. No same-discipline adversary review by gate design.

self_attested.description: Must be true. Signals this artifact bypasses same-discipline adversary review per P0 gate design.

reason.description: Explains why self-attestation applies (must reference P0 stage gate definition).

stance.description: The rotating review stance the adversary applied. Null for P0 self-attested artifacts.

content_hash.description: [provenance] SHA-256 hex of the artifact's canonical serialization (UTF-8 JSON, keys sorted, no trailing whitespace). Used to detect drift between registry record and stored artifact.

reproduction.description: [provenance] Everything needed to re-run the producing computation from scratch.

seed.description: Random seed used in this run. Null for deterministic or non-stochastic artifacts.

container_digest.description: OCI image digest (sha256:...) of the compute container used. Null for non-containerized artifacts.

command.description: Full CLI invocation or script path that produces this artifact from the inputs.

input_hashes.description: SHA-256 content hashes of all direct inputs consumed by this artifact's producing run.

source_version.description: [provenance] Version or content hash of the primary source consumed by this artifact (e.g. sha256 of the framework PDF, a framework version tag). Enables downstream reproducibility checks.

git_commit.description: [provenance] Full SHA-1 git commit hash at the time of registration. Required for complete provenance per CLAUDE.md #8.

evidence_class.description: Evidence classification for finding-type artifacts. 'robust': replicates across the embedding ensemble and (for cross-framework claims) across independently-authored frameworks. 'intrinsic': holds across all frameworks. 'framework-specific': holds in some frameworks only. 'crosswalk-dependent': sensitive to alignment quality. 'provisional': single-team, pending replication. 'descriptive': observational/structural, not inferential. 'not-applicable': non-finding artifact (infrastructure, corpus, instrument).

depends_on.description: [provenance] List of artifact_ids this artifact directly depends on. Empty array for root artifacts. Used to construct the evidence-dependency graph in S8f and X2.

limitations.description: Acknowledged limitations for this artifact. Required (min 1 item) when evidence_class is 'robust' or 'intrinsic'. Must include the model-independence note when the artifact feeds cross-framework synthesis.

transcript_ref.description: [provenance] Relative path to the agent transcript file from repo root, e.g. transcripts/S4/scf/data-engineer-2026-06-08T12:00:00Z.md. Combined with reproduction, provides full provenance per CLAUDE.md #8.

created_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when context-manager wrote this registry entry.

registry_version.description: Schema version guard. Always '1.0'. Guards against consumers loading entries from a future incompatible schema.

revision_history.description: [provenance] Ordered list of revision records. Each entry documents a round of adversary rejection and producer revision. Empty array on first registration (no revisions yet).

timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of this revision.

summary.description: Short description of what changed in this revision.

defect_ref.description: Reference to the defect record in ledger/defects/ (stem of the defect filename) that triggered this revision.

description.description: Human-readable description of what this artifact contains.

_p0_adversary_constraint.$comment: When stage_id is NOT P0, the adversary.self_attested form is not permitted. This is enforced by the allOf[1] if/then block above (schema-level, draft-07). stage_gate.py --validate-artifact triggers jsonschema.validate() which evaluates this constraint.
